---
name: OEP Proposal (OMP Enhancement Proposal)
about: Propose a substantive change to the OMP Specification
title: '[OEP] '
labels: oep, spec
assignees: ''

---

## OEP Information
- **Title**: [Short description of the proposal]
- **Author**: [@github-username]
- **Status**: Draft
- **Type**: Standards Track (Core | Connector | Extended)

## Abstract
A short (~200 word) description of the technical issue being addressed.

## Motivation
Clearly explain why the existing specification is inadequate to address the problem that the OEP solves. What is the use case?

## Specification
The technical specification should describe the syntax and semantics of any new feature. Tell us what the change to the spec text looks like.

## Rationale
Why did you choose this design? What other designs were considered, and what is the evidence that this is the best one?

## Backwards Compatibility
Does this break existing archives? If so, how do we mitigate the impact on users?

## Security Implications
Does this proposal have security implications? Could it be abused?
